Simple, transparent pricing

Start free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees, no surprises.

Free

Perfect for getting started

$0
  • Create up to 3 events
  • Basic RSVP tracking
  • Email notifications
  • Public event page
Get Started
Most Popular

Pro

For serious event organizers

$19/month
  • Unlimited events
  • Advanced analytics
  • Custom branding
  • Priority support
  • Ticket sales
  • Custom invite pages
Start Free Trial

Enterprise

For large organizations

$49/month
  • Everything in Pro
  • Dedicated account manager
  • API access
  • SSO integration
  • White-label solution
  • 99.9% uptime SLA

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know about Evently.

After signing up, head to your dashboard and click 'Create Event'. Fill in the details like title, date, location, and description. You can publish it immediately or save it as a draft.

Ready to create your next event?

Join thousands of organizers who trust Evently to bring their events to life. Start for free — no credit card required.
